# Logister Documentation

Canonical product and integration documentation for Logister lives on this docs host. Logister is self-hosted and self-hostable first; the public hosted app at logister.org is a secondary option.

## Start here
- Docs home: https://docs.logister.org/
- Getting started: https://docs.logister.org/getting-started/
- Product guide: https://docs.logister.org/product/
- HTTP API: https://docs.logister.org/http-api/
- Self-hosting: https://docs.logister.org/self-hosting/

## Integrations
- Ruby integration: https://docs.logister.org/integrations/ruby/
- .NET integration: https://docs.logister.org/integrations/dotnet/
- Python integration: https://docs.logister.org/integrations/python/
- JavaScript integration: https://docs.logister.org/integrations/javascript/
- CFML integration: https://docs.logister.org/integrations/cfml/

## Operations
- Local development: https://docs.logister.org/local-development/
- Deployment config: https://docs.logister.org/deployment/
- ClickHouse: https://docs.logister.org/clickhouse/

## Audience
- Teams using Logister to connect app telemetry to daily work: grouped error triage, event investigation, related logs, performance visibility, check-in monitors, activity review, release visibility, and project sharing
- Teams planning and operating their own self-hosted infrastructure footprint for the Rails web app, PostgreSQL, Redis, Sidekiq workers, and optional ClickHouse, email, Turnstile, analytics, and static docs hosting
- Ruby teams using `logister-ruby`
- .NET teams using `logister-dotnet` with ASP.NET Core and C# services
- Python teams using `logister-python` with FastAPI, Django, Flask, Celery, and Python logging
- JavaScript and TypeScript teams using `logister-js`
- Lucee and Adobe ColdFusion teams sending structured CFML payloads over HTTP

## Product and packages
- App source: https://github.com/taimoorq/logister
- Secondary hosted/public app: https://logister.org/
- Ruby SDK source: https://github.com/taimoorq/logister-ruby
- .NET SDK source: https://github.com/taimoorq/logister-dotnet
- Python SDK source: https://github.com/taimoorq/logister-python
- JavaScript SDK source: https://github.com/taimoorq/logister-js
